question.text: GST applies to commodity derivative transactions on:

answer.text: Brokerage charges, exchange transaction fees, and other service charges
Only the profit earned from trading
No GST applies to commodity derivatives

explanation.text: **The Logic:** GST applies to service charges — brokerage, exchange fees, clearing charges, etc. It doesn't apply to the entire contract value or trading profits. **The Trap:** Not on full contract value or profits. GST does apply (not exempt). It's on the service component. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII covers GST on securities transactions. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** GST at 18% on brokerage adds to the total cost of trading — calculate the all-in cost including CTT, GST on brokerage, stamp duty, and exchange fees for accurate P&L assessment.
